en.extract:
Gray's lark (Ammomanopsis grayi) is a species of lark in the family Alaudidae.  It is found in south-western Africa in its natural habitat of hot deserts.


Taxonomy and systematics
Gray's lark was originally described as a species within the genus Alauda. It was then placed in the sister genus Ammomanes until re-classified in 2009 by the IOC into the monotypic genus Ammomanopsis. Some authorities still consider the species as Ammomanes grayi. Other names for Gray's lark include Gray's desert lark and Gray's sand lark.


Subspecies
Two subspecies are recognized: 

A. g. hoeschi - (Niethammer, 1955): Found in north-western Namibia and south-western Angola
A. g. grayi - (Wahlberg, 1855): Found in west-central and south-western Namibia


References

'''Gray's lark''' ('''''Ammomanopsis grayi''''') is a species of [[lark]] in the family [[Alaudidae]].  It is found in south-western Africa in its natural [[habitat]] of hot [[desert]]s.<ref>{{Cite web|url=http://sabap2.adu.org.za/docs/sabap1/514.pdf|title=The Atlas of Southern African Birds|last=|first=|date=|website=Southern African Bird Atlas Project 2|publisher=|access-date=November 9, 2016}}</ref>

==Taxonomy and systematics==
Gray's lark was originally described as a species within the genus ''[[Alauda]]''. It was then placed in the sister genus ''[[Ammomanes]]'' until re-classified in 2009 by the IOC into the [[monotypic]] genus '''''Ammomanopsis'''''.<ref>{{Cite web|url=http://www.worldbirdnames.org/updates/archives/taxonomy-version-2/|title=Taxonomy Version 2 « IOC World Bird List|website=www.worldbirdnames.org|access-date=2016-11-09}}</ref> Some authorities still consider the species as ''Ammomanes grayi''.<ref>{{Cite web|url=http://avibase.bsc-eoc.org/species.jsp?avibaseid=9E0E6D4E46F43BC2|title=Ammomanopsis grayi - Avibase|website=avibase.bsc-eoc.org|access-date=2016-11-09}}</ref> Other names for Gray's lark include '''Gray's desert lark''' and '''Gray's sand lark'''.
 
=== Subspecies ===
Two [[subspecies]] are recognized:<ref>{{Cite journal|title=IOC World Bird List 6.4|url=http://www.worldbirdnames.org/ioc-lists/crossref|journal=IOC World Bird List Datasets|doi=10.14344/ioc.ml.6.4|doi-access=free}}</ref> 
* ''A. g. hoeschi'' - <small>([[Günther Niethammer|Niethammer]], 1955)</small>: Found in north-western Namibia and south-western Angola
* ''A. g. grayi'' - <small>([[Johan August Wahlberg|Wahlberg]], 1855)</small>: Found in west-central and south-western Namibia

zh.extract:
格氏漠百灵（学名：Ammomanes grayi），是百灵科漠百灵属的一种，是游猎迁徙的候鸟，分布于安哥拉和纳米比亚。全球活动范围约为198,000平方千米。该物种的保护状况被评为无危。
格氏漠百灵的平均体重约为21.4克。栖息地为热带沙漠。


参考文献
